title: stelis fractiflexa
intro: Stelis fractiflexa, a species of orchid native to the tropical forests of Central and South America, is a type of flowering plant known for its unique and delicate appearance. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Stelis fractiflexa include the treatment of wounds, skin infections, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential use as an antiviral agent. Herbal preparations of the plant often involve the use of its roots, leaves, and flowers, which can be dried, crushed, or infused to create teas, tinctures, and ointments.
